name: Carlos Díaz Castellón
background: Mr. Díaz joined the Company in 1996. He has served as our Executive Vice President of Lithium since 2018. Previously, he served as our Vice President of Operations and as our Vice President of Logistics and Supply Chain. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

commpanies.name: Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A.
